    AddHolidayCommand.handleBothLocalAndOtherConflicts(CalendarContext context, CalendarService service, Scanner consoleScanner, LocalDate date, String currentFilePath, Map<String, CalendarContext> allCalendars, List<AddHolidayCommand.ConflictItem> localConflicts, List<AddHolidayCommand.ConflictItem> otherConflicts)
